narrative:
Sugarcreek 151 (precinct in Greene County) has 2,463 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
